name: School Sucks Pack Black Cards List
blackCards: Alright, which one of you kids has been typing “______” into YouTube?
Hey kids! Are you ready for the best summer ever? Welcome to Camp ______!
Oh noooooo, the substitute teacher is ______!
That’s not fair! You can’t give me detention for ______.
What’s pretty much the stupidest thing in the world?
whiteCards: Barfing mustard.
Being bad at school but good at microwaving burritos.
Being forced by the government to go to school for eight hours a day.
Being unable to learn because I am a pinecone.
Boring stuff that nobody cares about.
Cheating.
Disappointing your parents.
Ditching school.
Driving around town in a tank.
Everyone in class pooping their pants at the same time.
Farting in my sister’s lunchbox and closing it.
Getting picked last.
Getting your tongue stuck in a vacuum cleaner.
Going to school naked.
Graduating from Idiot University with a degree in Stupid.
Hijacking the schoolbus and driving it straight to Six Flags.
Not doing my homework.
Not knowing what a triangle is.
Paying Dad five dollars to do my homework.
Poop poop poop poop poop poop poop poop poop poop poop poop poop poop poop poop poop poop poop poop poop poop poop poop poop poop poop Rejecting modern society and living life as a raccoon.
Screaming “I AM A MOSQUITO!” and running around biting people.
Stealing a penguin and taking it home in your backpack.
The answers to tomorrow’s math test.
Throwing a water balloon full of horse pee at the teacher.
